query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  customerName,
  createdAt,
  JSON_LENGTH(pullList) AS pull_list_items,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pullList, '$[0].movement') AS first_movement,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pullList, '$[0].fromLocationType') AS first_from_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pullList, '$[0].toLocationName') AS first_to_loc
FROM allocation_runs
WHERE pullList IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:

FROM allocation_runs
